This article details the [[Catalans Dragons]] rugby league football club's 2006 season. This is their 1st season in the [[Super League]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.telegraph.co.uk/sport/2331921/Catalan-prepare-to-cross-new-frontiers.html|title=Catalan prepare to cross new frontiers|work=The Telegraph |date=9 February 2006 |accessdate=30 December 2018}}</ref> Catalans won their first Super League match 38-30 at home against [[Wigan Warriors]] in front of 11,000 people.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/sport2/hi/rugby_league/super_league/4697948.stm|title=Catalans Dragons 38-30 Wigan|work=BBC Sport |date=11 February 2006 |access-date=30 December 2018}}</ref>

==Table==
{{Super League XI ladder|showteam=CAT}}

==Milestones==

*'''Round 1:''' [[Laurent Frayssinous]], [[Justin Murphy (rugby league)|Justin Murphy]], [[Teddy Sadaoui]], [[John Wilson (rugby league, born 1978)|John Wilson]], [[Mark Hughes (rugby league, born 1976)|Mark Hughes]], [[Sean Rudder]], [[Stacey Jones]], [[Chris Beattie]], [[Julien Rinaldi]], [[Adel Fellous]], [[Jérôme Guisset]], [[Jamal Fakir]], [[Ian Hindmarsh]], [[Grégory Mounis]], [[Renaud Guigue]], [[Pascal Jampy]] and [[Alex Chan (rugby league)|Alex Chan]] made their debut for the Dragons.
*'''Round 1:''' [[Justin Murphy (rugby league)|Justin Murphy]], [[Jamal Fakir]], [[Laurent Frayssinous]], [[Renaud Guigue]], [[Ian Hindmarsh]] and [[Mark Hughes (rugby league, born 1976)|Mark Hughes]] scored their 1st try for the Dragons.
*'''Round 1:''' [[Laurent Frayssinous]] kicked his 1st goal for the Dragons.
*'''Round 2:''' [[Bruno Verges]] and [[Julien Touxagas]] made their debut for the Dragons.
*'''Round 3:''' [[Thomas Bosc]] made his debut for the Dragons.
*'''Round 3:''' [[Chris Beattie]], [[Thomas Bosc]] and [[John Wilson (rugby league, born 1978)|John Wilson]] scored their 1st try for the Dragons.
*'''Round 4:''' [[Grégory Mounis]] scored his 1st try for the Dragons.
*'''Round 5:''' [[Michael Dobson (rugby league)|Michael Dobson]] and [[Lionel Teixido]] made their debut for the Dragons.
*'''Round 5:''' [[Michael Dobson (rugby league)|Michael Dobson]] scored his 1st try for the Dragons.
*'''Round 6:''' [[David Berthezène]] made his debut for the Dragons.
*'''Round 6:''' [[Adel Fellous]] and [[Lionel Teixido]] scored their 1st try for the Dragons.
*'''Round 6:''' [[Michael Dobson (rugby league)|Michael Dobson]] kicked his 1st goal for the Dragons.
*'''Round 7:''' [[Alex Chan (rugby league)|Alex Chan]] scored his 1st try for the Dragons.
*'''CCR4:''' [[Frédéric Zitter]] and [[Rémi Casty]] made their debut for the Dragons.
*'''CCR4:''' [[Rémi Casty]], [[Frédéric Zitter]], [[Sean Rudder]] and [[Bruno Verges]] scored their 1st try for the Dragons.
*'''Round 8:''' [[Jérôme Guisset]] scored his 1st try for the Dragons.
*'''Round 8:''' [[Bruno Verges]] scored his 1st hat-trick for the Dragons.
*'''Round 8:''' [[Michael Dobson (rugby league)|Michael Dobson]] kicked his 1st drop goal for the Dragons.
*'''Round 9:''' [[Julien Rinaldi]] kicked his 1st goal for the Dragons.
*'''Round 10:''' [[Aurélien Cologni]] and [[Sébastien Martins]] made their debut for the Dragons.
*'''Round 10:''' [[Aurélien Cologni]] scored his 1st try for the Dragons.
*'''Round 14:''' [[John Wilson (rugby league, born 1978)|John Wilson]] scored his 1st hat-trick for the Dragons.
*'''CCR5:''' [[Michael Dobson (rugby league)|Michael Dobson]] reached 100 points for the Dragons.
*'''Round 15:''' [[Stacey Jones]] scored his 1st try for the Dragons.
*'''Round 16:''' [[Julien Rinaldi]] scored his 1st try for the Dragons.
*'''Round 17:''' [[Younes Khattabi]] made his debut for the Dragons.
*'''Round 17:''' [[Stacey Jones]] kicked his 1st goal for the Dragons.
*'''Round 20:''' [[Justin Murphy (rugby league)|Justin Murphy]] scored his 1st hat-trick for the Dragons.
*'''Round 22:''' [[Mathieu Griffi]] made his debut for the Dragons.
*'''Round 25:''' [[Cyrille Gossard]] made his debut for the Dragons.
*'''Round 25:''' [[Justin Murphy (rugby league)|Justin Murphy]] scored his 25th try and reached 100 points for the Dragons.
*'''Round 25:''' [[Thomas Bosc]] kicked his 1st goal for the Dragons.
